content: Self-Refine's iterative unsupervised refinement framework can be adapted to address a key flaw of existing LLM self-reflection mechanisms: over-reliance on consistent single-perspective feedback that traps outputs in local optima. By structuring multi-perspective reflection signals from frameworks like Self-Contrast and Mirror into the iterative self-feedback loop of Self-Refine, we can get higher-quality outputs without adding any supervised training or extra model fine-tuning.
